description_long: This is a modern, full-size white pickup truck with a four-door crew cab configuration and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear. The front features a bold grille, prominent headlights, and a robust bumper, while the sides display large, dark-tinted windows and pronounced wheel arches. The rear view reveals a wide tailgate, rear lights, and a visible manufacturer badge. The truck sits on large, sturdy wheels with black tires, and the body is primarily composed of painted metal panels with some plastic trim. The interior, though not fully visible, likely includes fabric or leather seats, a dashboard, and various controls. This vehicle is designed for both utility and passenger transport, commonly seen in urban and suburban environments.
description: A white, four-door pickup truck with a spacious cargo bed and robust design, featuring large wheels and a bold front grille. It is suitable for both utility and passenger use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, headlights, and wide windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door crew cab, large windows, and extended cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, tailgate, and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the crew cab and cargo bed.
